title: Session 19 — Downtime
bodyText:
# What happened
- **Varen**: library spellbooks + the **chained book** radiating necromancy.
- **Mr. Spells' office** (business card → unmarked building → cloaked escort): business talk, inventory questions; he and Felson discussed working together, he **secretly gifted Felson a weapon** and told him to come back with a truly grand **wish** in mind.
- Eddy + Brolin questioned Filbert about missing money; Felson + Cumb got intel on Filbert's house from a working orphan.
- **Varen + Eira performed Judy's ritual — it worked.** Follow-up ritual revealed the bombshell: **Brolin and Eira share the same mother.** Eira admitted she wants to **eviscerate Root Darkpass**.
- Soni gave a **large diamond** (revivify). G arrived; the only firm plan: **G stages a protest/riot at the main gate as the distraction.**
